tree.name: Leonard Miller
tree.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Ayo Dosunmu, Julian Phillips, and a 2031 2nd round pick swap right to Timberwolves for Rob Dillingham, Leonard Miller, a 2026 2nd round pick (least favorable), a 2027 2nd round pick (CLE own), and a 2032 2nd round pick (more favorable).

assetsGivenUp.name: Ayo Dosunmu
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 38th overall by Chicago Bulls from Illinois in 2021 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Julian Phillips
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 54th overall by Chicago Bulls from Tennessee in 2023 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick Swap Right
assetsGivenUp.note: 2031 2nd round pick swap right sent to MIN in Dillingham/Miller trade
